name: Enea AB (publ)
summary: Enea AB (publ) provides software products for telecommunication, cybersecurity, and aerospace/defense industries worldwide. It offers Enea network function virtualization (NFV) Partner Ecosystem that provides system integration services, managed services for enterprise networking, management and orchestration solutions, uCPE white box hardware, VNFs for SD-WAN, and security and NGFW; and Enea NFV Access, a UCPE virtualization platform. The company provides Enea OSE, a real-time operating system for multi-processor systems; Enea OSEck, an operating system for high-performance and memory constrained applications; Enea Linux, a purpose built commercial embedded Linux distribution for multiple architectures; Real-Time Accelerated Linux, a real-time enabled Linux solution; and Enea Fast Path, a cross-platform user space TCP/IP stack. It offers Enea Element High Availability, an application development framework that simplifies the design and implementation of applications; Enea Element On-Device Management, a model driven network function management agent that provides standard-based northbound interfaces for configuration, monitoring, and control of physical and virtual network functions; and Enea ElementCenter, a model-driven EMS/NMS development framework. The company provides Qosmos ixEngine, a deep packet inspection software; Qosmos Probe, a software that generates detailed traffic information in virtualized networks; Enea Netbricks, a collection of highly portable networking protocols; and Polyhedra, a relational database management system for embedded systems and server-based applications. It offers traffic management product comprises Video Optimization, Data Monetization, IP Traffic Management, and Integra NFV Platform; 5G data management products, such as Unified and Cloud Data Manager, Digital Identity, and Data Aggregation; Enea Product Security; training; and support services. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.
